findings.signature: SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='memory_fts'
findings.notes: FTS5 virtual table existence probe; Turso lacks FTS5 — this check and all memory_fts consumers must be replaced or gated

findings.signature: ALTER TABLE memory_index ADD COLUMN learned_triggers TEXT DEFAULT '[]'
findings.notes: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN DDL; supported by Turso but PRAGMA table_info introspection path differs in libSQL
PRAGMA table_info used for migration idempotency check; libSQL supports PRAGMA but returns different metadata shape in some versions

findings.signature: ALTER TABLE memory_index DROP COLUMN learned_triggers
findings.notes: ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN requires SQLite 3.35.0+; Turso/libSQL supports but verify version compatibility

findings.signature: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='memory_fts'
findings.notes: FTS5 gate: determines whether SQLite FTS5 or in-memory BM25 is used; Turso migration must replace this with alternative lexical engine detection

findings.signature: SELECT id, title, content_text, trigger_phrases, file_path FROM memory_index WHERE id IN (?)
findings.notes: Reads memory_index table columns; column set is the canonical schema surface for BM25 — no FTS5 dependency in this path

findings.signature: SELECT id FROM memory_index ORDER BY id
findings.notes: Full table scan for BM25 warmup; pure SQL read — Turso-compatible as-is
Engine routing enum: 'sqlite' mode requires FTS5; Turso migration must add a new engine value or repurpose 'sqlite' to mean libSQL-compatible lexical
Field weight constants consumed by FTS5 bm25() ranking function; Turso lacks bm25() built-in — weights must be applied in application-layer scoring
Decision function for FTS5 vs in-memory BM25; Turso migration must redirect this to non-FTS5 lexical path

findings.signature: checks memory_fts CREATE statement for learned_triggers absence
findings.notes: Safety check that learned_triggers stays out of FTS5 index; concept transfers to Turso but implementation must target replacement index
Channel routing config includes 'fts' and 'bm25' channels; Turso migration must remap 'fts' channel to non-FTS5 lexical backend
Quality-gap fallback explicitly names 'fts5' tier; Turso migration must rename or replace this tier identifier
Fallback mode string references fts5; Turso migration must update enum value or add alternative mode
Column name constant; schema is TEXT DEFAULT '[]' JSON array — Turso-compatible as-is
